title: [DO NOT MERGE] Master openssl trim cirrus

:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4028) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Closing in favor of https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4165. Feel free to reopen if the change is still desired.
